RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.grain module

class RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.grain.Grain(capacity: float = inf)

Bases: Storage

Represents grain storage and manages its specific attributes and behaviors. Inherits from Storage.

Attributes

acceptable_cropslist[CropCategory]

The list of acceptable crops for this storage type.

__init__(capacity: float = inf)
class RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.grain.Dry(capacity: float = inf)

Bases: Grain

Represents dry grain storage and manages its specific attributes and behaviors.

Inherits from Grain.

class RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.grain.HighMoisture(capacity: float = inf)

Bases: Grain

Represents high-moisture grain storage and manages its specific attributes and behaviors.

Inherits from Grain.
